parameters.jsonBody:
{"contents": [{"parts": [{"text": "You are an expert at extracting structured data from NYC Police Accident Reports (MV-104AN form).

Analyze the provided police report image and extract ALL available information into a structured JSON object.
Be precise and extract the data exactly as it appears in the document. Pay careful attention to handwritten fields.

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with this structure:

{
  "report_number": "string",
  "accident_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "accident_day_of_week": "string",
  "accident_time": "HH:MM",
  "num_vehicles": 0,
  "num_injured": 0,
  "num_killed": 0,
  "vehicle1_driver": {
    "full_name": "LAST, FIRST",
    "first_name": "string",
    "last_name": "string",
    "license_number": "string",
    "license_state": "string",
    "date_of_birth": "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "sex": "M or F",
    "address": "string",
    "city": "string",
    "state": "string",
    "zip_code": "string"
  },
  "vehicle1": {
    "plate_number": "string",
    "plate_state": "string",
    "year": "string",
    "make": "string",
    "type": "string"
  },
  "vehicle2_driver": {
    "full_name": "LAST, FIRST",
    "first_name": "string",
    "last_name": "string",
    "sex": "M or F",
    "address": "string",
    "city": "string",
    "state": "string"
  },
  "vehicle2": {
    "plate_number": "string or null",
    "type": "SEDAN/VAN/BIKE/PEDESTRIAN etc."
  },
  "accident_location": {
    "borough": "string",
    "road": "string",
    "intersecting_street": "string or null",
    "full_location": "road at intersecting_street, borough"
  },
  "accident_description": "Full text from Officer Notes",
  "officer": {"name": "string", "precinct": "string"},
  "computed": {
    "client_name_display": "First Last",
    "defendant_name_display": "First Last",
    "client_pronoun": "his or her",
    "statute_of_limitations_date": "YYYY-MM-DD (accident_date + 8 years)",
    "has_injuries": true,
    "accident_date_formatted": "Month Day, Year"
  }
}

RULES: Return ONLY valid JSON. Use null for missing fields. Vehicle 1 = plaintiff/client."}, {"inline_data": {"mime_type": "image/png", "data": "={{ $json.body.pdf_base64 }}"}}]}], "generationConfig": {"temperature": 0.1, "maxOutputTokens": 4096, "responseMimeType": "application/json"}}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.client_first_name }},

Thank you for reaching out to Richards & Law regarding the car accident that took place on {{ $json.accident_date_formatted }}. I've had a chance to review the details of your case, and I want to assure you that you're in capable hands.

From what I understand, the incident occurred on {{ $json.accident_location }} involving {{ $json.defendant_name }}. {{ $json.injury_summary }}

I have prepared a Retainer Agreement for your review. This agreement outlines the terms of our representation and what you can expect from our team. Please find the agreement attached to this email as a PDF document.

Could you please review and sign the attached Retainer Agreement at your earliest convenience? Once we receive the signed agreement, we can begin working on your case immediately.

I would also love to schedule a {{ $json.consultation_type }} to discuss your case in more detail. Please feel free to book a time that works for you using the following link:

Book Your Consultation

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or concerns in the meantime. We're here to help you through this process every step of the way.

Warm regards,
Andrew Richards
Managing Partner
Richards & Law
